---
title: "Pulakesh Pradhan"
listing:
  id: latest-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  max-items: 6
  categories: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-5 .profile-column}
::: {.profile-card}
![](images/pulakesh.jpg){.profile-img}

# Pulakesh Pradhan

::: {.social-links}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
[Github](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan){.social-btn}
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_DhEQHEAAAAJ){.social-btn}
[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@SpatialGeography){.social-btn}
[Email](mailto:pulakesh.mid@gmail.com){.social-btn}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-7 .bio-column}
I am a Geographer and Spatial Data Scientist specialized in GIS and Remote Sensing. My work leverages Google Earth Engine and AI to solve complex spatial problems.

[**View full CV →**](cv.qmd){.cv-link}

:::

:::

<hr>

## 📌 Latest Insights
::: {#latest-posts}
:::

[View all posts →](blog.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .mt-3}
